M
Miguel Ángel Chávez Trani · You
Audiovisual Producer / Content Creator
Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada · Visit my website
now · 🌐
···

10 years of experience creating commercials and digital content campaigns for internationally recognized brands, including Silk, Nestlé, McCain, Weber, Upfield, Corazón Films in Mexico, and Adidas Canada, ARC Iberico Imports, Vancouver Laser & Skin Care confirmed one thing:

The automatization of advertising and film production will never reach the level of the human eye. Not in the way we find meaning in simple details, in unplanned moments, in true stories that connect with real audiences and deliver something stronger than a campaign brief can ask for.

Let's create something that connects. 📸✨

#Filmmaking #ContentCreator #BrandStorytelling #Vancouver #CreativeProduction

Brands & Clients

My Target: Delivering
Real Value Through Brands.

My passion is film, but the opportunity is in advertising and production. Agencies, studios, and tech companies that challenge, pay, and help me grow toward where I want to go.

Also open to editing, VFX, video production coordination, and social media management.

Explore Portfolio
02
Positioning
Audiovisual Producer and Content Specialist. Also open to editing, VFX, and video production coordination.
03
Value Proposition
Adaptation, problem-solving, detail, and the curiosity to keep improving. Multiformat vision, imagination.
04
Content Strategy
Sharing best projects, art, philosophy, and new technologies — inspiration for creators and professionals.
05
Brand Voice
Professional, friendly, mostly inspirational. Always a point of view through ideas and advertising.
06
Success Metrics
Profile views, post impressions, and real projects with people who value what I bring.
